message:
🐛 Fix NetworkUtils crash when latest ping result is undefined (#106)

Use `!= null` instead of `!== null` to properly check for both
undefined and null when accessing latency. This fixes the crash
that occurred when adding all cards from the catalog.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
